soc_dashboard_update.title: Eveus: update SOC cards and automations to use native entities
soc_dashboard_update.description:
Eveus integration now creates the SOC input entities automatically for your Eveus charger device.

These new native entities replace the manually created `input_number.ev_*` helpers that were used before. The existing values are copied automatically, so you do not need to enter them again.

Please update all dashboard cards, automations, scripts, and templates that reference the old SOC helper entities.

To migrate, replace the old entity-ID prefix `input_number.ev_` with the new native Eveus prefix `number.eveus_`. One find-and-replace updates all four SOC inputs:

- `input_number.ev_initial_soc` → `number.eveus_initial_soc`
- `input_number.ev_target_soc` → `number.eveus_target_soc`
- `input_number.ev_battery_capacity` → `number.eveus_battery_capacity`
- `input_number.ev_soc_correction` → `number.eveus_soc_correction`

Your existing `input_number.ev_*` helpers are left untouched. Eveus integration will not delete or modify any of them automatically.

Once you migrate all dashboards, automations, scripts, and templates to the new `number.eveus_*` entities, you can safely delete the old helpers if you no longer need them.
